cards.back: A standard period of work or activity, usually 8 hours a day, in some countries or industries
A regular schedule of work, where an employee works 8 hours a day, 5 days a week
A reduced schedule of work, where an employee works less than 8 hours a day, usually 2-4 days a week
A standard period of work, where an employee works for 8 consecutive hours, usually from morning to afternoon
A typical duration of work or activity, widely accepted and used as a standard for various industries and organizations
